# AssignedWorkDocument.PartIDs

**Enumeration**

An enumeration containing the identities of parts managed by this view.

## Declaration

```swift
enum PartIDs
```

## Layer types

- **all**: All part IDs containable by this document.
- **assignableDocumentAuthors**: The identifier for the part that stores authorship information.
- **assignableDocumentBase**: The identifier for the part that contains the base PDF upon which this document is built.
- **assignableDocumentInstructionMarkup**: The identifier for the part that stores markup intended to provide additional instructions to takers of the assignable.
- **assignableDocumentQuestionBoxes**: The identifier for the part that stores question definitions.
- **assignees**: The identifier for the part that stores takers participating in this document.
- **scoreAnnotations**: The identifier for the part that stores score annotations.
- **scorerMarkup**: The identifier for the part that stores markup created by the scorer.
- **scorers**: The identifier for the part that stores scorers participating in grading this document.
- **takerMarkup**: The identifier for the part that stores markup created by the taker.

## Getting the document type

- **AssignedWorkDocument.PartIDs.Document**: The document type that this part ID is for.

## Inspecting a work document

- **AssignedWorkDocument.ID**: A type representing the stable identity of this document.
- **id**: The stable identity of this document.
- **isMultiPageDocument**: `true`, if this document has more than one page; `false`, otherwise.
- **isPartial**: Denotes whether or not this document is a partial one.
- **partIDs**: Returns a collection of identifiers reflecting the manifest of parts available in the document.
- **scoreAnnotations**: The collection of score annotations for this work document. Treated as a multiset. i.e. The order of the elements doesn’t matter and duplicate values are allowed.
- **scorers**: The identities of users scoring this assigned work. Treated as a set.
- **pagesDebugDescription**
- **AssignedWorkDocument.Error**: Errors for this document type.
